report_summary:
**DONE: ACRAN BOGAZICI KIMYA A.S., TR — Risk: 3 MONITOR — All sanctions clean (OFAC, OS, UN SC); MERSIS 0179058934400011; İstanbul plastic raw materials trader since ~2007; LEI LAPSED April 2024; ownership opaque (MERSIS/TTSG inaccessible); Turkey country-level EDD required; directors not confirmed.**

---

## 📋 Research Summary

| Field | Finding |
|---|---|
| **Legal name (TR)** | ACRAN BOĞAZİÇİ KİMYA ANONİM ŞİRKETİ |
| **Provided ID** | LEI 789000QT2MEWP26E4Q21 (**not** a tax ID) |
| **MERSIS** | **0179058934400011** |
| **LEI status** | ⚠️ **LAPSED** (expired April 30, 2024; not renewed) |
| **Address** | İstoç Ticaret Merkezi, Bağcılar, İstanbul 34218 |
| **Business** | Plastic raw materials trading (polymers/petrochemicals) |
| **Operating since** | ~2007 (website copyright) |

---

### 🛡️ All 8 Workstreams

**1A – Registry:** MERSIS 0179058934400011 confirmed via GLEIF. LEI entity status ACTIVE (last GLEIF update Sep 2024) but LEI registration LAPSED. MERSIS and TTSG require authentication — request certified ticaret sicil tasdiknamesi from counterparty.

**2A – Ownership:** **OPAQUE** — No parent disclosed in LEI (exceptions declared). MERSIS shareholder data not accessible. UBO declaration required.

**3A – Sanctions: ALL CLEAN**
- ✅ OFAC SDN — NO HIT
- ✅ OpenSanctions — NO HIT (checked all name variants and LEI)
- ✅ UN SC — NO HIT
- Context: Several Turkish chemical companies ARE on OFAC/OS sanctions lists (Naab Kimya/IRAN, Klas Kimyasal/IRAN, Expert Machinery/RUSSIA) — Acran is NOT among them.

**4A – Adverse Media:** None found. Search capability limited (Brave API unavailable) — supplement with manual Turkish media search.

**5A – Turkey-specific checks:** MERSIS ✗ (auth required) | TTSG ✗ (JS required) | KAP ✗ (not listed) | SPK ✗ (not capital markets) | MASAK ✗ (not public) | UYAP ✗ (not public) | Turkey removed from FATF Grey List June 2024 ✅

**6A – PEP:** Directors not identified — cannot screen. Request MERSIS extract for director names.

**7A – Trade Risk:** Plastic polymers — low dual-use risk. Turkey sector-level Russia/Iran transshipment flag. Request specific product list and supply chain origins.

**8A – Key Actions:**
1. Certified MERSIS extract (ticaret sicil tasdiknamesi)
2. UBO declaration under Turkish Law 5549
3. Director passport copies → PEP screen
4. Russia/Iran EDD questionnaire
5. Turkish media search when Brave API restored
6. LEI renewal status inquiry
---
